accepted_residuals: Top Frag profile suggested View all surfaced 30 visible rows; rows are not an exhaustive TikTok recommendation graph.
Root Follow was not clicked because suggestions were already source-visible before following.
Suggested candidates were not opened, followed, or registry-preflighted in this pass.
This pass captured the recommendation set only; candidate account sizes were not captured, so the handle list alone does not answer larger/core versus smaller/long-tail mix.
Visible profile/grid labels are source-visible page labels, not Silver metric rollups.
Public contact text was visible but intentionally not persisted as contact data.
Ordinary Playwright click did not expand View all; bounded pointer/click event dispatch did expand it in the same session.
